mapper.select: select count(*) from room_blacklist where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and until_date >= curdate()
select from room_blacklist where user_id = #{userId} and status = '0' and until_date >= curdate() order by until_date desc, id desc limit 1
mapper.sql: id, user_id, reason, until_date, status, create_by, create_time, remark
mapper.insert: insert into room_blacklist (user_id, reason, until_date, status, create_by, remark) values (#{userId}, #{reason}, #{untilDate}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{remark})
